design_philosophy.core_loop: Vertical scrolling with weapon segregation: missiles for ground targets, lasers for air targets. Navigate waves of enemies, collect power-ups to upgrade weapons, defeat boss at level end.
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Weapon loss on death creates high-stakes combat; player must balance aggressive advancement with preservation of current loadout.
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Pilot an armored combat vessel defending space stations against overwhelming waves of enemies; gain power through equipment upgrades.
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Forced air-to-ground/air-to-air weapon segregation is a tactical constraint unique to the design—players cannot be universally equipped, forcing strategic choice in approach to mixed enemy waves.

difficulty.lives_system: Standard multiple lives system; death results in weapon loss and checkpoint restart
difficulty.continues_system: Continues available for arcade/home version progression
difficulty.checkpointing: Player is moved to a point slightly before death location upon losing a life; partial checkpoint recovery rather than full stage restart
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Power-up collection provides upgrade progression for weapon strength; weapon choice strategy (maintaining air vs ground loadout) affects difficulty perception

progression.upgrade_system: Weapon power-ups collected during levels increase firing power. Multiple power-up types available throughout stages to improve armament.
progression.unlock_mechanism: Level progression gated by boss defeat; each stage concludes with mandatory boss encounter
replayability_hooks: High-score chasing inherent to arcade shmup structure
Varied enemy wave patterns encourage pattern learning
Weapon upgrade variety allows different playstyle approaches across runs

world_building_techniques: Space station defense scenario establishes setting
Enemy variety implies multiple threat types (aerial vs ground forces)
Boss encounters suggest escalating threat magnitude

boss_design.philosophy: Mandatory encounter at level conclusion testing player mastery of weapon systems and pattern recognition

faction_indicators: Player operates as sole defender of space station network
Enemy forces presented as unified threat (no faction variation documented)
danger_signals: Weapon loss mechanic creates high-stakes moments
environmental_storytelling: Multiple space stations under defense imply broader conflict
Enemy types (air, ground) suggest coordinated military assault
Vertical scrolling battlefield shows continuous enemy reinforcement
